revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-135

Principal axis (of a sound source or receiver) 

Generally the axis of structural symmetry or the direction of maximum emission or response. 

Reference direction serving as an origin for angular co-ordinates used in describing the directional characteristics of the sound source or receiver.


Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
